definitions.text: Contrary to reason or propriety; obviously and flatly opposed to manifest truth; inconsistent with the plain dictates of common sense; logically contradictory; nonsensical; ridiculous; silly. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
Having no rational or orderly relationship to people's lives; meaningless; lacking order or value.

The opposition between the human search for meaning in life and the inability to find any; the state or condition in which man exists in an irrational universe and his life has no meaning outside of his existence.
